Showing lines 1 to 61
The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: import re
2: 
3: with open('index.html', 'r') as f:
4:     html = f.read()
5: 
6: # Isolate <main> content
7: main_match = re.search(r'(<main>)(.*?)(</main>)', html, re.DOTALL)
8: if not main_match:
9:     print("Could not find <main>")
10:     exit(1)
11: 
12: main_content = main_match.group(2)
13: 
14: # Define regex patterns for each section
15: patterns = {
16:     'hero': r'(\s*<section class="hero">.*?</section>\n)',
17:     'partners': r'(\s*<!-- Trust Banner: Tourism Boards -->\s*<section class="tourism-partners".*?</section>\n)',
18:     'chips': r'(\s*<section class="chips-strip".*?</section>\n)',
19:     'intent': r'(\s*<!-- Travel Styles / Intent Selection -->\s*<section class="section intent-section".*?</section>\n)',
20:     'featured': r'(\s*<section class="section" id="featured">.*?</section>\n)',
21:     'themes': r'(\s*<section class="section" id="themes">.*?</section>\n)',
22:     'split': r'(\s*<section class="section">\s*<div class="container split-layout">.*?</section>\n)',
23:     'destinations': r'(\s*<section class="section" id="destinations">.*?</section>\n)',
24:     'cta': r'(\s*<section class="section">\s*<div class="container cta-band">.*?</section>\n)',
25:     'stats': r'(\s*<section class="section section-soft">.*?</section>\n)',
26:     'trust': r'(\s*<!-- Trust & Credibility Pillars -->\s*<section class="section trust-section".*?</section>\n)',
27:     'reviews': r'(\s*<section class="section" id="reviews">.*?</section>\n)',
28: }
29: 
30: sections = {}
31: for key, pattern in patterns.items():
32:     match = re.search(pattern, main_content, re.DOTALL)
33:     if match:
34:         sections[key] = match.group(1)
35:     else:
36:         print(f"Failed to find {key}")
37:         exit(1)
38: 
39: new_order = [
40:     'hero',
41:     'intent',
42:     'featured',
43:     'chips',
44:     'themes',
45:     'destinations',
46:     'split',
47:     'partners',
48:     'stats',
49:     'trust',
50:     'reviews',
51:     'cta'
52: ]
53: 
54: new_main_content = "\n" + "".join(sections[key] for key in new_order)
55: new_html = html[:main_match.start(2)] + new_main_content + html[main_match.end(2):]
56: 
57: with open('index.html', 'w') as f:
58:     f.write(new_html)
59: 
60: print("Successfully rearranged sections in index.html!")
61: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
